Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 (plastic manufactured items)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 (plastic manufactured items)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 to delete plastic manufactured items from the list of toxic substances in Schedule 1 to that Act.
His Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Item 132 of Part 2 of Schedule 1 to the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 is repealed.
